long_description:
NRE were alerted of link flaps between ass01b.sr01.dal09 Et7/15 <-> mss99.sr08.dal09 Et50/1. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19666
short_description: ass01b.sr01.dal09 Et7/15 <-> mss99.sr08.dal09 Et50/1 | Link Flap
close_notes: Link shut to mitigate any further impact. Will proceed to do Layer1 troubleshooting to resolve any issues with the link before adding it back to service. (Note: This incident was resolved via automation.)
